results.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search terms or filters.

errors.timeout: Search timed out. Please try again.

tco.title: Total Cost of Ownership
tco.maintenanceHint: Common rule: 1-2% of property value per year

projection.description: Cumulative costs, equity built, and property value over time

investment.description: Analyze the potential return on investment for a property.

investment.emptyHint: Results will appear here after analysis.

cashFlow.title: Cash Flow Projection
cashFlow.description: Yearly cash flow and cumulative returns
cashFlow.ariaLabel: Cash flow projection chart showing yearly cash flow and cumulative returns over time

diversification.typeAria: Property type distribution pie chart showing portfolio allocation by property type

scenario.title: Appreciation Scenarios
scenario.description: Property value projections under different market conditions
scenario.ariaLabel: Appreciation scenarios line chart showing property value projections under pessimistic, realistic, and optimistic conditions

rentVsBuy.title: Rent vs Buy Calculator
rentVsBuy.description: Compare renting vs buying over time with break-even analysis.
rentVsBuy.emptyHint: Enter property details and current rent to see the comparison.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.description: Comprehensive rent vs buy comparison over {years} years.
results.advantageExplanation: Positive = buying is financially better. Negative = renting is better.

cumulativeCost.title: Cumulative Cost Comparison
cumulativeCost.ariaLabel: Cumulative cost comparison chart showing rent vs buy costs over time

equityGrowth.title: Equity & Property Value Growth
equityGrowth.ariaLabel: Equity and property value growth chart over time

portfolio.title: Portfolio Analyzer
portfolio.description: Analyze multiple properties as a portfolio.
portfolio.emptyHint: Add at least one property to analyze the portfolio.

whatsNearby.description: Points of interest in the neighborhood

whatsNearby.dataNotAvailable: Nearby places data not available for this location.

cityComparison.title: City Comparison
cityComparison.description: How this neighborhood compares to the city average

cityComparison.dataNotAvailable: City comparison data not available for this location.
cityComparison.scoresHigherThan: This neighborhood scores higher than {percentile}% of areas in {city}
cityComparison.averageAcross: This neighborhood scores close to the city average across all factors.

details.detailedFactorDescription: Raw values and data sources for each factor

newFactors.title: Extended Quality Factors
newFactors.description: Additional environmental and accessibility metrics for a complete neighborhood assessment

airQuality.label: Air Quality
airQuality.description: Measures air pollution levels using the Air Quality Index (AQI). Lower values indicate cleaner air.

noiseLevel.label: Noise Level
noiseLevel.description: Average ambient noise level in decibels. Lower values indicate a quieter environment.

publicTransport.label: Public Transport
publicTransport.description: Number of public transport stops within 1km. Higher values indicate better accessibility.

newFactors.dataFreshness: Data freshness: Air Quality updated {airQuality}, Noise Level updated {noiseLevel}, Transport updated {transport}

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.
settings.emailRequired: Set an email in Identity settings above to access this section.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Set the email address used to scope settings to your account.

notifications.title: Notifications

notifications.notificationTypesDesc: Choose which notifications you want to receive.
notifications.priceAlertsDesc: Get notified when property prices change.

notifications.unsubscribeLinkText: Click here to unsubscribe from all notifications.

privacy.allowContactDesc: Allow other users to contact you directly.
